metadata.name: Burst Lightning kicked vs unkicked — conditional damage
metadata.description: Tests Burst Lightning's kicker mechanic (CR 702.33) in two sequential scenarios. Scenario 1: p1 casts Burst Lightning kicked (paying {R}+{4}=5 total), targeting p2's Wall of Omens (0/4). The spell was kicked so it deals 4 damage, which equals Wall of Omens' toughness — state-based actions destroy it. Scenario 2: p1 casts a second Burst Lightning without kicker (paying only {R}), targeting p2's Bog Raiders (2/2). It deals 2 damage, killing the 2-toughness creature. Both scenarios confirm the Condition::WasKicked branch in the card definition is correctly evaluated at resolution time.
metadata.generation_notes: Burst Lightning definition (definitions.rs ~line 2067): mana_cost {R}, kicker cost {4} generic (is_multikicker: false). Spell effect is Effect::Conditional { condition: Condition::WasKicked, if_true: DealDamage(Fixed(4)), if_false: DealDamage(Fixed(2)) }. Targets: TargetAny (creature or player). Scenario 1: kicked=true means 4 damage. Wall of Omens is 0/4 — receives 4 damage which equals its toughness, so SBA 704.5g destroys it. Mana needed for kicked cast: {R} + {4} generic = mana_paid {red:1, colorless:4}. Scenario 2: kicked=false (omitted), 2 damage. Bog Raiders is 2/2 — 2 damage equals toughness, SBA destroys it. Both Burst Lightnings are in p1's starting hand; p1's mana pool is pre-loaded with {red:2, colorless:4} to cover both casts without needing land-tap actions.

script.step_note: Scenario 1: p1 casts Burst Lightning kicked targeting Wall of Omens (0/4)

actions.description: Initial: p1 has 2x Burst Lightning in hand; p2 has Wall of Omens and Bog Raiders on battlefield

actions.note: CR 702.33a: p1 pays the kicker cost {4} in addition to the base cost {R}, marking the spell as kicked. Total payment: 5 mana.

actions.description: After kicked cast: Burst Lightning on stack, p1 hand down to 1 card
actions.note: Kicked Burst Lightning is on the stack waiting for priority to pass.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority; top of stack resolves.

resolution.note: CR 702.33d + 120.3: Spell was kicked so Condition::WasKicked is true; deals 4 damage (not 2) to Wall of Omens.

actions.note: CR 608.2: Burst Lightning resolves. Condition::WasKicked selects the if_true branch (4 damage).
CR 704.5g: Wall of Omens (0/4) has 4 damage marked on it, which equals its toughness. SBA destroys it and it moves to p2's graveyard.
CR 704.3: SBAs checked after resolution. 4 damage >= 4 toughness — lethal.

actions.description: After kicked Burst Lightning resolves: Wall of Omens dead, stack empty, Bog Raiders still alive, life totals unchanged
actions.note: Kicked Burst Lightning dealt 4 damage, exactly enough to kill a 4-toughness creature. Player life totals are unaffected — the target was the creature, not either player.

script.step_note: Scenario 2: p1 casts second Burst Lightning unkicked targeting Bog Raiders (2/2)

actions.description: Before unkicked cast: p1 has 1 Burst Lightning in hand, Bog Raiders still on p2's battlefield

actions.note: CR 601.2: p1 casts Burst Lightning without paying the kicker cost, paying only the base {R}. Condition::WasKicked will be false at resolution.

actions.description: After unkicked cast: Burst Lightning on stack, p1 hand empty
actions.note: Unkicked Burst Lightning is on the stack.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority; stack resolves.

resolution.note: CR 120.3: Spell was not kicked so Condition::WasKicked is false; deals 2 damage (the if_false branch) to Bog Raiders.

actions.note: CR 608.2: Unkicked Burst Lightning resolves for 2 damage — the base, unenhanced effect.
CR 704.5g: Bog Raiders (2/2) has 2 damage marked on it, which equals its toughness. SBA destroys it.
CR 704.3: SBAs checked after resolution. 2 damage >= 2 toughness — lethal.

actions.description: Final state: both p2 creatures dead, both Burst Lightnings in p1 graveyard, player life totals still 40
actions.note: Unkicked Burst Lightning dealt 2 damage, exactly enough to kill a 2-toughness creature. Both scenarios confirm the Condition::WasKicked branching logic works correctly.
